title: Meeuwen sterven in de haven
director: Rik Kuypers, Ivo Michiels, Roland Verhavert
writer: Rik Kuypers, Ivo Michiels, Roland Verhavert
actors: Tine Balder, Tone Brulin, Alice De Graef
plot: A pessimistic urban drama, with a musical score by Jack Sels and Max Damasse, charts in strongly expressionistically lit black-and-white images the wanderings of a tormented man through the cosmopolitan port city of Antwerp. The o...
